channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know
item.description: [MarTech] We've updated our page on Agentforce with details on Intent-Aware Search in Agentforce for Commerce. The post Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: China bars Manus co-founders from leaving country amid Meta deal review: FT
item.description: [Business Times] The case highlights Beijing’s broader concerns about the loss of valuable technology to a geopolitical rival

item.title: New partnerships, facilities by JTC to bolster startups at LaunchPad @ one-north
item.description: [Business Times] This includes a new co-working and event space for networking, investor meetings and community events

item.title: Anthropic Supply-Chain-Risk Designation Halted by Judge
item.description: [WIRED AI] A judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration’s designation, clearing the way for Anthropic to keep doing business without the label starting next week.

item.title: Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge
item.description: [BBC Technology] US District Judge Jane Boyle said the company had failed to show it had suffered any harm under federal competition laws.

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] As AI leaders scramble for viable business models, the moves from OpenAI and Meta look less strategic and more like panic under pressure. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Data built modern marketing, but AI is rewriting the rules
item.description: [MarTech] Marketers have long treated data as the goal. AI flips that model. Here’s how to adapt your data strategy. The post Data built modern marketing, but AI is rewriting the rules appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: How NotebookLM turns marketing docs into usable insights
item.description: [MarTech] Upload research, reports and campaign data to explore patterns, answer questions and uncover insights from your own material. The post How NotebookLM turns marketing docs into usable insights appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Why Chinese tech companies are racing to set up in Hong Kong
item.description: [BBC Technology] Mainland firms are using the territory to test products and as a springboard for global expansion.

item.title: Tech CEOs suddenly love blaming AI for mass job cuts. Why?
item.description: [BBC Technology] More tech leaders are pointing to job cuts caused by AI tools - and a need for more investment cash.

item.title: Singapore’s deep-tech push requires ‘calculated bets’, stronger ecosystem: NUS Enterprise’s Benjamin Tee
item.description: [Business Times] Such ventures are not about moving from ‘zero to one’, but about scaling breakthroughs to impact millions, he says

item.title: Bluesky’s new app is an AI for customizing your feed
item.description: [The Verge AI] The latest app from the team behind Bluesky is Attie, an AI assistant that lets you build your own algorithm. At the Atmosphere conference, Bluesky's former CEO, Jay Graber, and CTO Paul Frazee, unveiled Attie, which is powered by Anthropic's Claude and built on top of Bluesky's underlying AT Protoc

item.title: 科氪 | 变革传统同传设备，亮亮视野推出全球首创AR+AI会议翻译系统，部署中关村论坛
item.description: [36氪] 在2026中关村论坛主会场，亮亮视野联合智谱AI推出并部署了全球首创的AR+AI会议翻译系统，为主论坛及多场平行论坛提供大会翻译保障。这套系统深度融合亮亮视野AR眼镜与智谱AI大模型能力，可支持54种语言实时翻译，延迟小于1秒，单次续航8小时，并可7×24小时稳定运行。这标志着国际会议翻译从传统设备和人工依赖，迈向更高效率、更低成本、更强普惠性的 AR+AI 新阶段。 长期以来，国际会议翻译领域始终受困于部署繁琐、成本高昂、语种覆盖有限、实时传递滞后等核心痛点。尤其在大型论坛、专业峰会等高端跨语言交流场景中，传统同传模式更受限于包厢搭建、接收设备调试、专业人工译员稀缺及会场信号不稳定等多重

item.title: Suno leans into customization with v5.5
item.description: [The Verge AI] Suno just released one of its biggest updates yet with v5.5 of its AI music model. Where previous updates focused mostly on improving fidelity and creating more natural vocals, v5.5 is about giving users more control. It includes three new features: Voices, My Taste, and Custom Models. In the releas

item.title: Why can’t TikTok identify AI generated ads when I can?
item.description: [The Verge AI] I've been struggling to tell whether the ads appearing in my TikTok feeds have been made with generative AI tools. As someone who spends a great deal of time scrutinizing images and videos for the usual "tells" that something was synthetically generated, some of the promotions I've seen have definit

item.title: Why OpenAI killed Sora
item.description: [The Verge AI] On Tuesday morning, everything was business as usual at OpenAI. By the end of the day, the company had announced that it would scrap its video-generation app, Sora, and reverse plans for video generation inside ChatGPT; it would wind down a $1 billion Disney deal; it would shuffle the role of a high

item.title: 中信建投：非银估值处于低位，板块战略配置价值凸显
item.description: [36氪] 36氪获悉，中信建投研报表示，证券板块三重边际向好，2026年业绩超预期可期。保险板块配置价值显现，建议关注高股息、低估值、业绩敏感性较低个股投资机会。港股非银板块在低估值特征与盈利改善预期共振下中长期配置价值凸显。多元金融板块方面，监管逻辑趋稳、促消费导向明确、AI技术提效的背景下，消费金融行业处于政策红利+与技术红利的双重驱动期。

item.title: 15% of Americans say they’d be willing to work for an AI boss, according to new poll
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] According to a Quinnipiac University poll, 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to have a job where their direct supervisor was an AI program that assigned tasks and set schedules.

item.title: 【钛晨报】单家最高130亿元！港A股上市公司密集公告回购计划；时隔逾2年，贵州茅台再度宣布涨价；爱奇艺拟赴港二次上市
item.description: [钛媒体] TCL科技：拟收购广州华星半导体45%股权，交易价格93.25亿元；蚂蚁财富收购香港耀才证券完成股权交割，新董事会成员获委任；深圳华强北现内存条抛售行情，有商户称部分型号一周降价近三成；特斯拉：TERAFAB项目正式发布，预计将实现每年超1太瓦算力产出；世界数据组织成立。

item.title: Popular AI gateway startup LiteLLM ditches controversial startup Delve
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] LiteLLM had obtained two security compliance certifications via Delve and fell victim to some horrific credential-stealing malware last week.

item.title: Australia investigates tech giants over social media ban compliance
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Commentary: The oil market is moving into demand destruction mode
item.description: [CNA Tech] If the Iran war continues and oil reserves are drained, policymakers may have to use emergency tools to curb energy use, says Javier Blas for Bloomberg Opinion.

item.title: As more Americans adopt AI tools, fewer say they can trust the results
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] AI adoption is rising in the U.S., but trust remains low, with most Americans concerned about transparency, regulation, and the technology’s broader societal impact, according to a new Quinnipiac poll.

item.title: Big Tech sports broadcast rights could imperil US local TV news, stations argue
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Powell says Fed can ‘wait and see’ how Iran war affects inflation
item.description: [Straits Times] His remarks appeared to calm financial markets that were betting Fed will hike rates to head off higher inflation from oil shock.

item.title: Italy data protection agency fines Intesa Sanpaolo $36 million over data breach
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Okta’s CEO is betting big on AI agent identity
item.description: [The Verge AI] Today, I’m talking with Todd McKinnon, who is co-founder and CEO of Okta, a platform that lets big companies manage security and identity across all the apps and services their employees use. Think of it like login management — actually, that’s a great way to think about it because the way most peop

item.title: Bangladesh seeks US waiver to import Russian diesel as energy crisis deepens
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Mantis Biotech is making ‘digital twins’ of humans to help solve medicine’s data availability problem
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Mantis takes disparate sources of data to make synthetic datasets that can be used to build so-called "digital twins" of the human body, representing anatomy, physiology and behavior.

item.title: India approves over $750 million in projects for electronic component manufacturing
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: 跨越AI鸿沟：构建企业AI应用价值评估体系
item.description: [钛媒体] 既能精准捕捉 AI 的独特价值，又能适配业务战略，为 AI 应用提供全生命周期的动态引导。

item.title: 光模块龙头中际旭创发布年报，2025年净赚超百亿
item.description: [钛媒体] AI需求爆发，中际旭创营收、净利均创下新高，但近期的供应链瓶颈和远期的技术迭代风险仍需警惕。

item.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.

item.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

item.title: Singapore agencies and TikTok to train workers for retail jobs in live-streaming era
item.description: [Straits Times] Some businesses, such as Shiseido, say live streaming has driven up their sales during major sales events.

item.title: The truth about martech in 2026
item.description: [MarTech] AI is exposing what your martech stack can’t hide. In 2026, teams without the skills and processes to support it won’t be able to prove ROI. The post The truth about martech in 2026 appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 伊朗战争可能会长期持续，投资者眼下正在何处寻找赢家
item.description: [钛媒体] 随着与伊朗战争相关的波动撼动市场，投资者正转向买入派息的能源股、老牌科技股以及金属类资产。

item.title: The hidden tradeoffs in moving to a composable martech stack
item.description: [MarTech] Best-of-breed stacks promise agility, but the real impact on speed and cost depends on how well teams manage integration, data and operational complexity. The post The hidden tradeoffs in moving to a composable martech stack appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Singapore stocks close flat amid escalating Middle East tensions
item.description: [Straits Times] Sembcorp Industries led the gainers on Singapore’s blue-chip index.

item.title: 回看2025，AI的系统工程时刻：重构智能的底座与边界
item.description: [钛媒体] AI竞争的核心，正从单一模型的参数竞赛，转向覆盖芯片、框架、模型、平台乃至应用的全栈“系统工程”能力比拼。

item.title: 从“天坑专业”到AI大厂“香饽饽”：文科生用“人味”拿下三万offer
item.description: [钛媒体] 当AI学不会“做人”，大厂招聘风向也变了……

item.title: Cotton On Asia to close; liquidators appointed
item.description: [Straits Times] Brands under the Cotton On umbrella include Cotton On Body, Cotton On Kids, Typo and Rubi.

item.title: 氪星晚报｜全国首个万卡级全栈自主可控智算集群点亮；泡泡玛特乐园门票将涨价；蚂蚁集团安全团队发现OpenClaw多个高危漏洞并协助快速修复
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 全国首个万卡级全栈自主可控智算集群点亮 深圳人工智能高质量发展迎来新突破：3月26日，深圳市投建的11000P 智能算力集群正式点亮，加上去年先期点亮的3000P，目前该集群已全面建成14000P智能算力。这是全国首个使用全国产先进芯片构建的万卡级全栈自主可控智算集群。 特斯拉：TERAFAB项目正式发布，预计将实现每年超1太瓦算力产出 36氪获悉，据TeslaAI微博消息，TERAFAB项目正式发布，预计将实现每年超过1太瓦（1TW）的算力产出。马斯克预测，未来人形机器人行业的潜在年产量或将达到10亿至100亿台。随着机器人进入更大规模应用阶段，对高性能芯片的需求将

item.title: The IRS Wants Smarter Audits. Palantir Could Help Decide Who Gets Flagged
item.description: [WIRED AI] Documents show the tax agency is testing a Palantir tool to surface “highest-value” audit and investigation targets from a maze of legacy systems.

item.title: 对话原力灵机唐文斌：我不喜欢讲我不信的话，也无法成为我不想成为的人
item.description: [36氪] 文｜富充 编辑｜苏建勋 创业满一年，唐文斌的身上依旧保留着旷视时期的印记，在和我们的对话中，他时常说到“本质”这个词——那是旷视内部的一个“流行词”。 清华“姚班”毕业之后，唐文斌和同学印奇、杨沐在2011年创办了旷视科技。在这家AI 1.0标志性企业中，人们喜欢追问“本质”。 创业旷视的14年里，唐文斌经历了AI 1.0浪潮的完整起伏。从高歌猛进的业务扩展，到屡次与上市失之交臂，这些经历也打磨着他对“本质”的理解。 关于对旷视最重要的反思，唐文斌认为是摊子不要铺得太大，而是应该先集中全力，把一个最有优势的业务做透。 近来履新阶跃星辰董事长的印奇，在不久前的采访中也有过

item.title: 这次，我们不再需要海外对标
Pinery Residences in Tampines is third project launch to surpass 90% sales in 2026
item.description: [Straits Times] Project's appeal could also come from its Tampines location.

item.title: Asia stocks slump as oil prices head for biggest monthly rise ever
item.description: [Straits Times] Brent crude rose 2.5 per cent to $115.35 a barrel, bringing its gains in March to nearly 60 per cent.

item.title: All the latest in AI ‘music’
item.description: [The Verge AI] AI has touched every part of the music industry, from sample sourcing and demo recording, to serving up digital liner notes and building playlists. There are technical and legal challenges, fierce ethical debates, and fears that the slop will simply crush working musicians through sheer volume. Is i

item.title: 「微元合成」获3亿元A+轮融资，联合发布AI生物计算开放合作平台 | 36氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 36氪获悉，2026年3月，「微元合成」完成3亿元A+轮融资，由河南投资集团汇融基金和谭瑞清先生参与投资。本轮融资将助力微元合成拓宽AI生物计算应用边界，加大核心技术研发投入与场景化落地。 据介绍，此前，河南投资集团已完成AI基础设施产业的深度布局，从投资芯片、控股超大规模算力，到全面整合HALO资产，为AI场景应用的落地提供了电力与算力支持。值得关注的是，本轮投资人谭瑞清为复旦大学校董及化学系校友会会长、A股知名上市公司龙佰集团联合创始人、前任副董事长，深耕化工行业创业、投资三十余年。 在生命科学全面迈入AI4S时代，蛋白质结构预测与设计等底层技术突破，正改变着生物制造行业的研发范式

item.title: AI Research Is Getting Harder to Separate From Geopolitics
item.description: [WIRED AI] A policy change announced by NeurIPS, the world’s leading AI research conference, drew widespread backlash from Chinese researchers this week and then was quickly reversed.

item.title: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
item.description: [BBC Technology] The changes will see the recommended retail price of the PS5 rise from £479.99 to £569.99 in the UK.

item.title: Apple Still Plans to Sell iPhones When It Turns 100
item.description: [WIRED AI] As the tech giant turns 50, WIRED spoke to executives about how they plan to win in the AI era.

item.title: Lloyds bank reveals IT glitch affected almost half a million customers
item.description: [BBC Technology] In a letter to the Treasury Select Committee, Lloyds apologised and said some compensation had been paid.

item.title: The Latest AI Documentary Asks: Just How Scared Should We Be?
item.description: [WIRED AI] The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist seeks the middle ground on a polarizing technology—and ends up letting tech execs like Sam Altman off the hook.

item.title: I Asked ChatGPT 500 Questions. Here Are the Ads I Saw Most Often
item.description: [WIRED AI] Ads are rolling out across the US on ChatGPT’s free tier. I asked OpenAI's bot 500 questions to see what these ads were like and how they related to my prompts.

item.title: This time it’s different: LaunchPad @ one-north’s next act signals a maturing startup ecosystem
item.description: [Business Times] The next iteration of it may be more structured and more technologically advanced

item.title: Why the Mac Mini is out of stock: A look at Singapore’s OpenClaw buzz
item.description: [Business Times] A new AI agent has taken the world by storm. Is this a new hype cycle or the start of a tech...

item.title: Judge rejects Pentagon's attempt to 'cripple' Anthropic
item.description: [BBC Technology] A federal judge told the government it could not immediately enforce a ban on Anthropic’s tools.
